modifier_text:
Assume that the ticket was created by a help desk analyst during a live phone call and that the person who created it speaks English as their first language.
You should write the description in a narrative style and use a short and minimal tone. The writing should have very limited detail and show limited technical understanding. There should be no spelling errors and some repeated wording or phrases.
raw_text:
short_description_text: Protecting sections of a form in Word.

full_description_text:  
The user was trying to protect certain parts of a form in Word. They were unsure how to do this and needed guidance. This issue came up during a phone call with the help desk.
short_description: Protecting sections of a form in Word.
description: The user was trying to protect certain parts of a form in Word. They were unsure how to do this and needed guidance. This issue came up during a phone call with the help desk.
